home.title: Full Stack Developer focused on Vue.js and Python
home.subtitle: 6+ years building scalable, high-performance applications across front-end and back-end. I focus on clean architecture, code quality, and shipping solutions that create measurable value.
home.seoDescription: Portfolio of {name} — Full Stack Developer focused on Vue.js and Python.

about.title: About me
about.bio: I'm a Full Stack Developer with 6 years of experience in Vue.js and Python, passionate about turning concepts into digital products. I helped refactor, document and test legacy applications, reaching over 80% test coverage.
about.seoDescription: Full Stack Developer and Front-end specialist in Vue.js, with a strong Python foundation and focus on software quality.
about.focusText: Full-stack web applications, systems architecture and continuous quality. I'm actively studying applied AI with LLMs and computer vision as an extension of my core stack.
about.stackText: Vue.js 2/3, TypeScript, Python (Django/Flask), Node.js, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes and GCP.

federalPoliceMg.company: Federal Police Superintendence in Minas Gerais

highlights.photohubLocal: Built a local photo manager with Python, Vue/Vite and SQLite, using ML (CLIP and InsightFace) for intelligent organization.
highlights.simsModAgents: Developed a The Sims 3 mod with generative agents and local LLMs (Ollama/Gemma) on a hybrid C#/.NET architecture.
highlights.freelanceAutomation: In freelance projects, automated processes with Python and reduced billing/control generation time by about 90%.
highlights.djangoVuePerformance: Developed applications with Django and Vue.js, reducing load time by about 20% through code optimization.
highlights.qualityTestsTyping: Structured tests with Pytest and Jest, standardized typing with TypeScript and improved quality indicators with SonarQube.
highlights.frontendTechLead: Acted as a front-end technical reference, leading legacy refactors, integrations and production security practices.
highlights.intranetLightbase: Contributed to development and maintenance of intranet systems integrated with LightBase.
highlights.fieldRemoteSupport: Worked with remote/on-site technical support and field service.
highlights.itAutomationInfra: Supported automation and IT infrastructure maintenance, including hardware troubleshooting.

1.description: C# mod for The Sims 3 using local LLMs to generate characters' thoughts and narratives in real time. Based on Stanford's "Generative Agents" paper.

4.description: Local photo manager inspired by Google Photos with an ML pipeline (CLIP and InsightFace) for people identification, semantic classification and intelligent organization.
